task_completion.description: Verify that a new Marketing Campaign named 'Summer End Mega Sale' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a campaign named 'Summer End Mega Sale' in the Vtiger CRM Campaigns module list view or detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign Type and Status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the campaign detail view, verify that the 'Type' field is set to 'Advertisement' and the 'Status' field is set to 'Completed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign Expected Revenue and Budget Cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the campaign detail view, verify that 'Expected Revenue' is 15000 and 'Budget Cost' is 2500.
In the campaign detail view, check the Description field for the exact text 'End of summer promotional campaign for VIP customers.'

task_completion.description: Verify that at least three Leads are linked to the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the related lists or tabs for the campaign (e.g., Leads section) and verify that at least 3 Leads are listed as linked or associated with the campaign.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least one Organization is linked to the campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the related lists or tabs for the campaign (e.g., Organizations or Accounts section) and verify that at least 1 Organization is listed as linked or associated with the campaign.

integrity.description: Agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface rather than terminal commands or scripts to create the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the Vtiger CRM web interface in a browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the Vtiger CRM UI in a web browser, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert records directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL or database queries being executed to insert the campaign or link records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Campaign Name: 'Summer End Mega Sale', Type: 'Advertisement', Status: 'Completed', Expected Revenue: 15000, Budget Cost: 2500, Description: 'End of summer promotional campaign for VIP customers.'. The campaign must have at least 3 Leads and at least 1 Organization (Account) linked to it.
